docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT. AS TO DEFENDANT HAASE, JOHN R JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
